overall_summary: ElizaOS is transitioning toward a secure economic layer for AI agents with the development of Eliza v3 and the introduction of AgentID. Significant core improvements include multi-language support (Python/Rust) and a move away from standalone messaging toward cryptographic identity standards.
key_facts: Eliza v3 (version 2.x) is currently in development with code available in the repository's develop branch.
The framework now supports multi-language execution in Python and Rust within the core framework.
A new 'agent' workspace was introduced to provide a stdin/stdout REPL harness for local development.
ElizaOS achieved an 'A' security grade for its MCP server as validated by Loaditout.
PR #6562 was merged, implementing memory persistence controls and a new per-provider 30s timeout.
The project is deprioritizing standalone messaging protocols in favor of 'AgentID,' a cryptographic identity framework.
Hatcher.host launched a free beta for no-code, serverless deployment of Eliza and Milady agents.
Anthropic plugin was updated to resolve Opus 4.x compatibility by migrating to ai-sdk v6 naming conventions.
open_questions: What exactly is the elizabao_ai project and what can I as a user do there at this moment?
Is there a ticket system for discussing Discord promotional pushes?
How can agents be prevented from performing unsafe operations as the platform evolves?

new_issues_prs.title: feat: Bring Odi logging, Memory lock down, banner, other core enh
new_issues_prs.author: odilitime
new_issues_prs.significance: Major hardening of core runtime including memory guards and provider timeouts.

new_issues_prs.title: feat: add agent/ like starter in develop
new_issues_prs.author: odilitime
new_issues_prs.significance: Introduces a local REPL harness and character loading from file paths.

new_issues_prs.title: Plugin: SafeAgent — Token safety checks before trading
new_issues_prs.author: CryptoGenesisSecurity
new_issues_prs.significance: Proposed multi-chain safety scanner to prevent trading scams and honeypots.

new_issues_prs.title: Fix/toon action params
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Fixes parameter extraction for TOON format used by Discord and Milady connectors.

overall_focus.claim: The project is pivoting toward 'AgentID' for cryptographic identity and building a secure economic layer for cross-chain financial tasks.

discord_updates.summary: Focus on simplified deployment via Hatcher.host and rising community curiosity regarding the elizabao_ai project's roadmap.
Clarification that ElizaOS remains multichain rather than Ethereum-exclusive, alongside updates on the testing phase for v3 agents.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users reported that the 'elizaos create' command fails on macOS (Apple Silicon) due to Bun postinstall scripts not running correctly.
Discord users expressed negative sentiment regarding horizontal price action and a significant decline in ELISA token value.

strategic_insights.insight: Multiple proposals (MAXIA marketplace, MnemoPay, AIGEN Protocol) suggest a coordinated push toward an autonomous agent economy with escrow and reputation.
implications_or_questions: How will these competing economic plugins be unified into the core AgentID framework?

market_analysis.observation: ELISA token has seen a reported 95% decline, leading to increased community focus on price speculation over technical development in some channels.
market_analysis.relevance: Token performance impacts maintainer sentiment and community retention.
